name: Emergency Credit Line Guarantee Scheme (ECLGS) 5.0
administered_by: National Credit Guarantee Trustee Company Limited (NCGTC), Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance
retrieval_text: 100% government-guaranteed additional credit line for existing MSME borrowers, providing additional credit of up to 20% of peak working capital utilised during the reference quarter, capped at Rs 100 crore per borrower. Guarantee coverage is 100% for MSMEs and 90% for non-MSME and airline-sector borrowers. Total scheme guarantee corpus is Rs 2,55,000 crore, applicable to loans sanctioned up to 31 March 2027 or until the guarantee corpus is exhausted, whichever is earlier. Restricted to borrowers with an existing credit relationship as of the scheme's reference date; not available to new-to-credit enterprises.
